Thanks for contributing to comparegamebackends.com.
Every claim must link to official documentation. See CONTRIBUTING.md.

## What changed and why

<!-- Describe the change. For a data correction, state the old value and the new value. -->

## Platform(s) affected

<!-- e.g. PlayFab, Colyseus, or "new platform: Photon", or "none / site code". -->

## Sources

<!--
REQUIRED for any factual claim. Link to official/primary documentation backing every
claim you add or change (vendor docs, pricing pages, official repositories).
Prefer primary sources over third-party summaries. Unsourced claims will be declined.
-->

-

## Checklist

- [ ] Every new or changed claim has a `sourceUrl` to official/primary documentation
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` is clean
- [ ] Tone is neutral and factual — no marketing superlatives, no AI-tell words
- [ ] Strengths and limitations are balanced (no all-positive entry)
- [ ] `lastUpdated` bumped on any changed entry in `lib/backends.ts`
- [ ] Logo added and referenced if this adds a new platform
- [ ] Research note added or updated in `research/`
